seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 150-200 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 300 words.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must contain exactly 150-200 words. The email must contain at least 300 words.
response:
It is impossible to write an email that contains exactly between 150 and 200 words while simultaneously containing at least 300 words. These two constraints are mathematically contradictory; a text cannot be both less than 201 words and greater than or equal to 300 words at the same time.

However, I can provide you with a well-written email asking for an extension that falls within the **150 to 200 word** range, which is the more common constraint for such requests.

Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the upcoming [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. I have been working diligently on this assignment and have completed the majority of the research and drafting phases. Unfortunately, an unexpected personal emergency has arisen that has temporarily prevented me from finalizing the remaining sections and conducting the necessary final review.

I understand the importance of meeting deadlines and the value of punctuality in our academic work. I have already submitted a draft of my work to ensure you have a baseline of my progress, and I am confident that I can complete the final polish and formatting within the next forty-eight hours if granted a short extension. I propose submitting the completed project by [Specific Date and Time], which would be a two-day extension.

I apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause and appreciate your understanding regarding this unforeseen circumstance. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
[Course Name/Number]
